statuses.description: Suite is declared as future work and cannot prove support.
Suite proves descriptor/fixture behavior only and cannot prove runtime support.
Suite has required evidence for its declared scope and may support a support claim when subject policy also allows it.
Suite exists and fails its required cases.
Suite has been retired and cannot prove current support.

notes: Only passing suites may carry support_claim=true. Planned and fixture_only never imply runtime service/provider support.
